feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Additional Fields required in Asset master
entry.content:
1. Brand and Model number and Custodian - should be part of General data.
  2. Invoice number should be part of Origin
  3. Building, Floor - under Time Dependent data -> Location

Please let us know how we can accomodate the above mentioned fields in Asset master.

CB user -> CB9980000001 

Regards,

Amit

entry.title: How to Implement Application Jobs which Automatically close Sales Orders (OR) In SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello Community,

I hope this message finds you well.

Can we close open sales order for specific distribution channels by adding reason for rejection or billing block automatically set in sales order via background job and adding custom logic and by creating Custom Field.

Also, any custom field need to create and enable which need to add in custom logic in the backed program in class or BO so that it will automatically close the Sales Order (Billing block or reason for rejection)

Also if possible please guide which custom field need to create or which standard field should be use in custom logic or BO.

Also if possible please provide short code that will useful to run on SAP S/4 HANA Pubic Cloud.

Regards,

Ashish

entry.title: FIFO Behavior for Whse Managed Storage Locations for Serial Managed Items in SAP S4 Public Cloud
entry.content: FIFO Behavior for Warehouse Managed Storage Locations for Serial Managed Items - Is it possible to base the FIFO behavior on the date of the actual Goods Receipt of the item and not on the updated GR date per Bin? This is in Public Cloud

entry.title: Error "/SCWM/L3690: Enter a destination HU" during RF Putaway WT Confirmation
entry.content:
We are encountering a discrepancy in RF Putaway behavior between the standard Starter Warehouse and a custom Warehouse within the same Starter System.

1. Symptom When performing RF Warehouse Order (WO) Putaway to a storage bin in Warehouse (Storage Type S001), which was provided by the Starter System, the following error occurs:

  • Error Message: Enter a destination HU (Message ID: /SCWM/L3690)

2. Comparison In the same Starter System environment, we created a new custom Warehouse (Storage Type ZRM01). When performing RF Putaway in this warehouse, the error does not occur, and the process is completed successfully without a destination HU.

There is no difference in the settings between the two storage types. I am curious which specific configuration in the standard warehouse is triggering this error.

entry.title: Mass Deletion of PRs with Deleted PO Items (S/4HANA Public Cloud)
entry.content:
Hi all,
I am looking for a "Clean Core" way to manage Purchase Requisition (PR) hygiene in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud.
When a PO item is flagged for deletion, the linked PR item reopens as an active requirement. We need an efficient way to mass delete or close.
Looking for standard Cloud-native solutions or best practices.
Thank You in Advance.

Regards,
Shubham

entry.title: QM01 Notification Item Overview defect description LOV search option in SAP Public Cloud
entry.content: Is there a way to add Defect description LOV search option in QM01 Notification Item Overview table without using the Item detail custom field?

entry.title: CO11N with auto GR can not generate batch automatically
entry.content:
Dear sap,

When i confirm the production order with auto GR by CO11N,   i have 2 situations as below,

1. If the output material GR storage is set no WM storage, it could generate the batch automatically with the production order confirmation synchronously.

2. If the output material GR storage is set WM storage, it could not generate the batch automatically with the production order confirmation synchronously. I only could create the batch in the app 'Change inbound deliveries' , and then process GR in the same app ''Change inbound deliveries' .

How could i generate the batch automatically with the production order confirmation synchronously by CO11N with WM storage?

BTW,  When i process GR by MIGO with WM storage, not by CO11N synchronously, it could create the batch automatically.

Thanks.

Ying

entry.title: SAP Help needed on below items
entry.content:
Hello,

Can we have default GL account xxxx1000 for list of users when doing GI (cost center, WBS) to pick automatically. We're using valuation grouping code 0001 for all the plants so we can't make changes in automatic account determination app for VBR. Please assist?

Can we add created by in view setting within overdue purchase order items app?

entry.title: Exchnage rates
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

scenario:

We have an issue with exchange pickup as we wanted to have exchange rate based on billing document created not with the shipping document for exporting goods .

but now the sap takes the exchange rate from shipping date .

what can be done to consider the exchange rate for billing doucment especially for export goods as that can correct e document cockpit to submit to ksef.

sometime some pdf showing different exchange rate for net price and different exchange rate for vat price what could be reason.

entry.title: Budget Availability Control Including Tax in PO – SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am working on SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Project System and facing an issue related to budget availability control.

Requirement:
The business expects that budget consumption should exclude tax amount from Purchase Orders i.e., only net value should be considered

Current Issue:
When creating a Purchase Order with account assignment to WBS:

  • The budget consumption is considering the gross value including tax instead of net value.

Questions:

  1. Is there any configuration in Public Cloud to exclude tax from budget consumption?
  2. Is this standard behavior or a limitation of Public Cloud?
  3. Are there any SSCUI settings or best practices to ensure only net value is considered?

Any guidance or similar experience would be very helpful.

Thanks in advance!

Best regards,
Aanchal Singh

entry.title: Creation of Alternative GL Accounts in YACN chart of accounts
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support Team,

We have recently created additional G/L accounts for our client within the standard chart of accounts YCOA, which is currently in use.

We observed that each of these G/L accounts is associated with an alternative G/L account from the local chart of accounts YACN. In this context, we intended to create new alternative G/L accounts within YACN and link them to the newly created G/L accounts in YCOA.

However, it appears that we are unable to create new G/L accounts in YACN, as the save option is inactive. Could you please confirm whether it is permitted in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud to create new G/L accounts in the local chart of accounts YACN? Alternatively, should we select and assign from the standard alternative G/L accounts already available in YACN?

Thank you in advance for your support.

Best regards,
Claudia

entry.title: Auto Fill Serial Numbers in Outbound Delivery
entry.content: Business Object which can be used to auto fill serial numbers in Outbound Delivery through a custom program in SAP S/4HANA Public cloud. Facing issue with not able to fill the serial number.

entry.title: Manage Project Billing Requests - Approver does not get exported to Excel
entry.content: When using Manage Project Billing Requests, when Approver is added to the results grid, it is not exported to excel when the export button  is pressed.

entry.title: Configuration Define instruction key is not found
entry.content: I need to create a new instruction key for payment files; however, I am unable to locate the configuration “Define Instruction Key” in Central Business Configuration.

entry.title: app " Schedule Tax Jobs" public cloud
entry.content:
We're writing regarding the following issue encountered on the app "Schedule Tax Jobs".

Our objective is using the Job Template "Advance Return for Tax" to make monthly prints of VAT Register automatic, and in particular we need to launch the job with a template where it is possible to exclude some "Document Types" with the Dynamic Selections.

The problem is that, while the Dynamic Selections are available in the app "Advance Return for Tax on Sales/Purchases", they seem not available in the Job Template.

In addition, we tried with the Job Template "Additional List for Advance Return for Tax on Sales/Purchases" but here there is no Document Numbering section, so it is not possible to update registers numbers accordingly.

Could you please advise on the topic?

entry.title: Recurring supplier invoice: Fill in mandatory field INVOICE_DOC_ITEM (table parameter GLACCOUNTDATA,
entry.content:
Hello,

when trying to execute a recurring supplier invoice in SAP Public Cloud the following error message occurrs.

Fill in mandatory field INVOICE_DOC_ITEM (table parameter GLACCOUNTDATA, row 3)

The error message occurrs for 3 rows, although all 31 rows are exactly the same.

Can anybody help?

Kind regards

Fabian

entry.title: Valuation Class Change – Posting Period Restriction and Financial Impact Clarification
entry.content:
Description:

We are performing a mass valuation class change for materials with existing stock.

Current scenario:

- Stock is written off at the end of the period (e.g., April 30)
- Valuation class is updated
- System does not allow posting stock back in the same period after valuation class change
- Error received: "Back-posting only possible with same valuation class"

As a result:

- We are required to post stock back in the next period (e.g., May 1)
- This creates a timing difference where:
 - Inventory is reduced in April
 - Inventory is restored in May
- Finance reports show consumption in April and discrepancies in month-end closing

Questions:
1. Is there any supported approach to complete write-off and write-on within the same posting period when valuation class changes?
2. Are there SAP-recommended best practices to minimize financial reporting impact in this scenario?

I would appreciate confirmation and any recommended approach for handling this process in a way that aligns with financial reporting requirements.

entry.title: The cost center cannot be changed in the WBS element after financial plan data has been uploaded
entry.content:
Hello SAP Support Team,

It is not possible to change the cost center in a WBS element after financial plan data has been uploaded via the Import Financial Plan Data app. Example: WBS element xxxxx. However, it is also not possible to delete the financial plan data in the “Delete Financial Plan Data” app.

Is this behavior intended by SAP by design, or is there a bug in the application? How is it supposed to be possible to adjust the cost center despite the financial plan data?I look forward to your response.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: SAP Public Cloud TRM-Special G/L indicator not defined or incorrect
entry.content:
Hello Community, 

I tried to reverse a loan in TRM, using the "Process Business Transactions" app, but I received the following error:

I've seen that in SAP On-Premise, the Special G/L flag can be deactivated using transaction /nob41 to revert the document, but in SAP Public Cloud, changes to the Posting Key cannot be made, as they are set by default.

Has anyone else encountered this problem?

I hope to receive some advice from you.

Thank you very much,

Dmytro.

entry.title: BADI to implement delivery split based on Stock Transport Order Line Item when run VL10B
entry.content:
BADI to implement delivery split based on Stock Transport Order Line Item when run VL10B.

When we create a Stock Transport Order with two or more item and we create the outbound delivery through VL10B or Schedule Delivery Creation App (job) system creates one delivery, we want to know if there is a method to add split logic based on previous document.
